title: scutellaria viscidula
intro: Scutellaria viscidula, also known as sticky skullcap or glandular skullcap, is a perennial plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria viscidula include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and premenstrual syndrome. Herbal preparations of Scutellaria viscidula can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
